title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: mod_security_crs bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for mod_security_crs is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The mod_security_crs package provides the base rules for the mod_security module.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): A form data, "??????"(a name of street/city in Japanese) is forbade by mod_security_crs-3.3.4-3.el8.noarch  [rhel-9] (JIRA:RHEL-80178)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
full_text:
An update for mod_security_crs is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The mod_security_crs package provides the base rules for the mod_security module.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): A form data, "??????"(a name of street/city in Japanese) is forbade by mod_security_crs-3.3.4-3.el8.noarch  [rhel-9] (JIRA:RHEL-80178)
